meta.title: Product - Mingrun Tech
hero.title: A portable AI perception system.
hero.body: Capsule case, chest camera, and wireless earbuds — three components designed for all-day wearable AI.
scenes.surface.title: Three components, each with its role.
scenes.surface.summary: Capsule case, wireless earbuds, chest camera — three components covering visual capture, voice interaction, and tactile feedback.
scenes.surface.stageSummary: Three pieces, each with its role.
scenes.surface.detail0.label: Capsule case
scenes.surface.detail0.body: Touch panel + earbud charging dock + status LED, molded as one.
scenes.surface.detail1.label: Chest camera
scenes.surface.detail1.body: 8g magnetic module. Silent standby, press to capture.
scenes.surface.detail2.label: Wireless earbuds
scenes.surface.detail2.body: AI results delivered by voice in real time. Hands and eyes free.
scenes.geometry.title: Open the case, grab your gear.
scenes.geometry.summary: 112° magnetic hinge opens one-handed. Earbuds pop up into place. Camera detaches magnetically for chest wear.
scenes.geometry.detail0.label: Hinge
scenes.geometry.detail0.body: Precision-damped hinge with a definite feel and angle hold.
scenes.geometry.detail1.label: Earbud pop-up
scenes.geometry.detail1.body: Earbuds lift slightly when the lid opens for one-handed retrieval.
scenes.geometry.detail2.label: Camera detach
scenes.geometry.detail2.body: Magnetic latch releases — clip it to your chest and it enters standby.
scenes.wear.title: Put it on. Start your day.
scenes.wear.summary: The camera reads your surroundings from your chest; the earbuds relay AI feedback. Commute, work, explore — it follows you.
scenes.wear.detail0.label: Wear
scenes.wear.detail1.label: Trigger
scenes.wear.detail1.body: Press the case button or tap the earbud to start sensing.
scenes.wear.detail2.label: Response
scenes.wear.detail2.body: Results delivered through the earbuds within 2–5 seconds.
scenes.engineering.title: Inspectable. Disassemblable. Production-ready.
scenes.engineering.summary: X-ray views, material callouts, tolerance checks — a full engineering perspective from design to manufacturing.
scenes.engineering.detail0.label: Exploded view
scenes.engineering.detail0.body: Every part layered out, assembly relationships at a glance.
scenes.engineering.detail1.label: Material callouts
scenes.engineering.detail1.body: Each component labeled with material, process, and surface finish.
scenes.engineering.detail2.label: Manufacturing-ready
scenes.engineering.detail2.body: Export engineering files directly to start tooling.
